narrative:
Precinct Washington (precinct in Hocking County) has 806 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
